purpose: Known TESS demo target and hot-Jupiter style signal check.
expected_context: Known planet host context may appear through target/catalog matching, but OrbitLab must still report candidates as follow-up evidence rather than confirmations.

purpose: Known multi-planet TESS target and alias/catalog context check.
expected_context: Multiple known planets may exist in external catalogs; OrbitLab should preserve TCE evidence and avoid overclaiming confirmation.
Kepler target should exercise Kepler product retrieval, BLS preview, full analysis, and AstroNet readiness/result surfaces.

purpose: K2/ExoMAC model path and multi-planet system check.
expected_context: K2 target should exercise K2 product retrieval and ExoMAC-KKT readiness/result surfaces.

purpose: Control-style real TESS target where no confirmed planet is assumed by this operation.
expected_context: If no strong TCE appears, OrbitLab should show no candidates or low-confidence/rejected signals clearly.
